briefs.title: BC Parks camping fees rise and non-residents now pay a surcharge starting January 30
briefs.summary: BC Parks updated its fee schedule: day-use fees now go up to $51 (from $35) and backcountry fees up to $25 (from $10). People who live outside BC must now pay an extra $5–$30 on top of the standard fee.
briefs.action_required: If your business books or resells BC Parks experiences, update your pricing info and customer communications now.

key_dates.label: BC Parks Recreation User Fees Regulation — new fee schedule takes effect

briefs.industries: Hotel & Accommodation, Transportation & Logistics, Natural Resources
